title: Smoky Roasted Pork in Terracotta-Dish
description: An earthy and post-workout Brazilian dish featuring white wine vinegar and bhuna. Kosher-friendly recipe that can be served as a quick snack after exercising.
instructions: Trim the pork shoulder, score the fat and season with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add garlic cloves and cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add bhuna spice mix to the pan and stir for another minute.
Transfer the pork to a terracotta dish, brush with olive oil, then sprinkle with white wine vinegar, salt, pepper, thyme sprigs, and garlic cloves.
Roast in the oven for 1 hour, or until the internal temperature of the meat reaches at least 75°C (165°F).
Rest for about 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
